name: MPB BHC, INC.
summary: Metro Phoenix Bank, Inc. provides banking products and services to small- to mid-sized businesses and real estate professionals. It offers personal and business checking, NOW, savings, IOLTA, and money market accounts. The company also provides commercial loan products, including working capital lines of credit/loans, asset-based lines of credit, and equipment loans, as well as loans to professionals, and non-profit and faith-based organizations; SBA and USDA loans; real estate owner-occupied property, income producing property, and construction project loans; loans for billboard acquisitions, billboard construction, and digital displays; and refinancing services. In addition, it offers cash management, remote and mobile deposit, lockbox processing, online banking; and merchant capture scanning services, as well as non-profit and HOA banking services. Metro Phoenix Bank, Inc. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona.
